title: Overcoming Fear
subtitle: Act despite uncertainty
description: Seven verses on courage, facing difficulty, and choosing action when everything in you wants to retreat. Each day builds your capacity to move through fear rather than around it.

title: Letting Go
subtitle: Release what you cannot control
description: Seven verses on acceptance, detachment from outcomes, and the quiet power of surrender. Learn to hold your plans loosely and find peace in what unfolds.

title: Finding Purpose
subtitle: Walk your own path
description: Seven verses on duty, authenticity, and the courage to follow your dharma. Stop comparing your chapter to someone else's and discover what is uniquely yours to do.

title: The Steady Mind
subtitle: Master your inner world
description: Seven verses on discipline, emotional mastery, and meditation. Build the mental steadiness that lets you respond rather than react, no matter what arises.

title: Duty vs Desire
subtitle: Choose the hard right
description: Seven verses on right action, selfless service, and the discipline of choosing what matters over what feels good. The path of karma yoga in daily life.
